pytorch_task_v1.prompt_instructions: Implement this ML task as a SINGLE self-contained Python file (task.py). Include all required functions AND a complete `if __name__ == '__main__':` block that trains the model, evaluates on a validation split, prints standard metrics (MSE, R2, parameter accuracy where applicable), and asserts quality thresholds so the script exits non-zero on failure. Do NOT create separate test files or README. The script itself is the test.
evaluation_rules: The `evaluate()` function MUST compute and return standard metrics: MSE, R2 score, and any task-specific metrics on the VALIDATION data split.

The `if __name__ == '__main__':` block MUST: (1) train the model, (2) evaluate on BOTH train and validation splits, (3) print all metrics clearly, (4) assert quality thresholds (e.g., R2 > 0.9, MSE < threshold), (5) exit 0 on success or non-zero on failure.
Do NOT use a separate test file. All evaluation logic goes in main().

tasks.description: Train a LeNet-style CNN on FashionMNIST with AdamW optimization, cosine annealing, and protocol-compliant self-verification.

requirements.data: Use torchvision FashionMNIST with an offline-safe FakeData fallback. Split into train/validation subsets.
requirements.implementation: PyTorch CNN with BatchNorm, AdamW optimizer, and CosineAnnealingLR scheduler.
requirements.visualization: Save confusion matrix and training curve artifacts.
requirements.validation: Validation accuracy must exceed a documented threshold and evaluate() must return MSE, R2, and accuracy-related metrics.

tasks.description: Denoise CIFAR-10 images with a convolutional autoencoder and verify reconstruction quality with MSE, R2, and PSNR.

requirements.data: Use torchvision CIFAR-10 with Gaussian corruption and an offline-safe FakeData fallback.
requirements.implementation: Convolutional encoder-decoder built entirely in PyTorch.
requirements.artifacts: Save reconstruction grids and metrics JSON.
requirements.validation: Validation MSE must beat the noisy-input baseline and PSNR must improve by a clear margin.

tasks.description: Train a GRU-based sentiment classifier on a synthetic IMDB-like corpus with gradient clipping and protocol-compliant evaluation.

requirements.data: Use a self-contained synthetic sentiment corpus with padding and masking-aware batching.
requirements.implementation: Embedding + GRU classifier with Adam optimization and gradient clipping.
requirements.validation: Report MSE, R2, accuracy, precision, recall, and F1. Validation accuracy must exceed a documented threshold.

tasks.algorithm: MLP on MNIST (Mixup + Label Smoothing + Warmup)
tasks.description: Train an MLP classifier on MNIST using mixup augmentation, label smoothing, and learning-rate warmup.

requirements.data: Use torchvision MNIST with an offline-safe FakeData fallback.
requirements.implementation: PyTorch MLP with mixup, CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1), and warmup scheduling.
requirements.visualization: Save training curves and final metrics.
requirements.validation: evaluate() must return MSE, R2, and classification metrics; validation accuracy must exceed a documented threshold.
